title: MediaGo license token
description: Signed authorization token issued by the license server after activation. The client verifies the server signature and gates features on `entitlements` only.

license_id.description: Stable identifier of the issued license, e.g. lic_xxx.

user_id.description: Optional account identifier bound to the license.

plan.description: Commercial plan name (pro / team / enterprise). Informational only — clients must never gate on plan.

entitlements.description: Granted entitlement ids as defined in features.yaml. Unknown ids must be ignored by clients.

expires_at.description: Token expiry (RFC 3339). Clients must re-activate after expiry.

license_api_version.description: License API version this token conforms to.
